summary: Instagram clone with Express backend, React frontend, PostgreSQL database

tasks.title: Set up PostgreSQL schema for users, posts, follows, likes
tasks.description: Create database migrations for core tables: users (id, username, email, password_hash, avatar_url, bio, created_at), posts (id, user_id, image_url, caption, created_at), follows (follower_id, following_id, created_at), likes (user_id, post_id, created_at), comments (id, user_id, post_id, text, created_at). Add indexes on foreign keys and created_at columns.

tasks.title: Build Express API with auth endpoints
tasks.description: Create Express server with JWT auth: POST /api/register, POST /api/login, GET /api/me. Use bcrypt for password hashing. Include middleware for auth token validation.
depends_on: Set up PostgreSQL schema for users, posts, follows, likes

tasks.title: Build REST API for posts and social features
tasks.description: CRUD endpoints: POST /api/posts (with image upload), GET /api/feed, POST/DELETE /api/posts/:id/like, POST /api/posts/:id/comment, POST/DELETE /api/users/:id/follow. Implement feed algorithm showing followed users posts.
depends_on: Build Express API with auth endpoints

tasks.title: Build React frontend with feed and profile pages
tasks.description: Create React app with: login/register pages, main feed page showing posts with infinite scroll, user profile page with grid of posts, like/comment interactions, follow button. Use React Router for navigation.
depends_on: Build REST API for posts and social features

tasks.title: Write API integration tests
tasks.description: Write tests for all API endpoints using vitest and supertest: auth flow, post creation, feed retrieval, like/unlike, comment, follow/unfollow. Include edge cases for unauthorized access.
depends_on: Build REST API for posts and social features

tasks.title: Set up Docker and CI pipeline
tasks.description: Create Dockerfile for the app, docker-compose for local dev with PostgreSQL, and GitHub Actions CI pipeline running tests on push.
